description: A declared Mqtt topic pattern. Wildcards: * (one segment), # (rest of path). Publishers and subscribers reference topics by id so renaming is one JSON edit away.

payload.description: shape of the message value (e.g. FloatArray, TagValue, Int)

published_by.description: array of AndroidModule.id that publish here

consumed_by.description: array of AndroidModule.id / AndroidScreen.id that subscribe
